title: HealthSnapshot
description: GET /health — confirm a detected mount is live JuiceMount. Grounded in JuiceMount6 (internal/metrics/metrics.go). HTTP 503 when healthy=false, else 200.

components.description: Per-component status; value is "ok" when healthy else a message. Keys observed: redis, minio, fuse, nfs. Omitted when no provider is set.
